name: banana-icon
description: AI Game Asset Generator powered by Nano Banana

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute banana-icon-db --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute banana-icon-db --file=./migrations/0002_add_reference_image.sql && wrangler d1 execute banana-icon-db --file=./migrations/0003_add_settings.sql
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute banana-icon-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute banana-icon-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_add_reference_image.sql && wrangler d1 execute banana-icon-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_add_settings.sql
